ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., movie, TV show, live stream) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the video */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the video */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the video (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representations" (
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representation */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the representation belongs to */,
  "representation_index" INTEGER /* Index of the representation */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the representation */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the representation */,
  "framerate" REAL /* Framerate of the representation */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Video codec used (e.g., H.264, HEVC) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the video file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the video (e.g., MP4, MKV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the representation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the representation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representations_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "representation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representation the metric belongs to */,
  "rebuffering_duration" REAL /* Rebuffering duration */,
  "video_bitrate" REAL /* Video bitrate */,
  "chunk_duration" REAL /* Chunk duration */,
  "qp" REAL /* Quantization parameter */,
  "mvm" REAL /* Motion vector magnitude */,
  "mos" REAL /* Mean opinion score */,
  "psnr" REAL /* Peak signal-to-noise ratio */,
  "ssim" REAL /* Structural similarity index */,
  "msssim" REAL /* Multi-scale structural similarity index */,
  "vqm" REAL /* Video quality metric */,
  "strred" REAL /* Spatial-temporal redundancy */,
  "vmaf" REAL /* Video multi-method assessment fusion */,
  "ssimplus" REAL /* SSIMPlus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., encoder, decoder, playback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_representation_id FOREIGN KEY ("representation_id") REFERENCES representations ("representation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., video quality engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES quality_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_quality_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_quality_reports_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES video_quality_reports ("report_id")
)
